3333500.name: Redline Express
3333500.description:
Welcome to Redline Express – a high-pressure parcel sorting & inspecting simulator, where efficiency is survival and mistakes are... suspicious.

 

Step into the reinforced boots of a warehouse operator working behind the Iron Curtain. Every package matters. Every decision is logged. And sometimes (always), the inspector watches.

 

🔧 Key Features

Soviet-inspired Sorting Simulation – Sort, search, inspect and ship thousands of state-controlled parcels with precision.

 

Sort Together – Sort side by side with 3 comrades

 

Dynamic Inspections – Handle unannounced visits from officials. Survive audits, inspections, and surprise interrogations

 

Facility Expansion – Unlock better equipment, and optimize the flow… or jam the system.

 

Sabotage System –Choose whether to report or cover up.

 

Cold War Narrative Layer – Receive daily memos, radio broadcasts, secret letters and strange packages.

 

Moral Choices – Will you follow orders or question the system?

 

🛠️ In development

This is a work in progress. Our goal is to deliver a gritty, mechanical gameplay loop wrapped in narrative tension. Expect surprises, inspections, and loads of raporting

 

🔔 Wishlist today

Your loyalty will be noted.

 

"Error rates exceeding 2.7% will be treated as sabotage. Glory to the Party."

"Error rates exceeding 2.7% will be treated as sabotage. Glory to the Line."

— Internal Memo #178B, Department of Postal Integrity
3333500.supported_languages:
英语*, 波兰语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
